incoming.heading: Cov xov tooj hu SIP tuaj
incoming.lead: Ib qho chaw nyob SIP tshwj xeeb rau kev xa cov xov tooj sab nraud los ntawm koj tus neeg muab kev pabcuam mus rau VibeVox system.
incoming.emptyTitle: Chaw nyob SIP nkag tsis tau tsim
incoming.emptyHint: Tsim ib qho SIP URI + tus ID nkag mus/password tshwj xeeb kom cov neeg siv khoom tuaj yeem hu rau koj los ntawm txhua lub xov tooj, thiab VibeVox yuav txhais koj lub suab tau tam sim ntawd.

outbound.heading: Kev hu xov tooj tawm
outbound.lead: Hu rau tus xov tooj los ntawm lub vev xaib interface thiab VibeVox yuav txhais koj cov lus sib tham hauv lub sijhawm tiag tiag.
outbound.noTrunkTitle: Ua ntej, teeb tsa lub SIP trunk tawm
outbound.noTrunkHint: Sau daim ntawv "New SIP Trunk" nyob rau sab saum toj ntawm nplooj ntawv - VibeVox yuav siv koj tus neeg muab kev pabcuam SIP (Zadarma, OnlinePBX, thiab lwm yam) rau kev hu xov tooj tawm.

outbound.configureFirst: Ua ntej, teeb tsa lub cev SIP tawm (daim ntawv saum toj no)

howTo.heading: Yuav teeb tsa li cas
howTo.step1: Tau txais cov ntaub ntawv pov thawj SIP trunk los ntawm koj tus neeg muab kev pabcuam (Zadarma, OnlinePBX, Asterisk).
howTo.step2: Sau lawv rau hauv daim foos saum toj no thiab txuag.
howTo.step3: VibeVox yuav tsim ib lub SIP trunk tawm hauv LiveKit Cloud.
howTo.step4: Yuav los sai sai no: SIP URI nkag mus rau kev hu xov tooj sab nraud.

page.title: Kev Teeb tsa Lag Luam
page.subtitle: Txhua qhov kev sib koom ua ke, cov yuam sij, thiab cov kev teeb tsa AI rau koj tus account
page.upsellTitle: Seem no muaj nyob rau ntawm txoj kev npaj Enterprise.
page.upsellBody: Ntawm no koj tuaj yeem teeb tsa: tus yuam sij Gemini API tus kheej, lub hauv paus lus qhia thiab kev paub, kev koom ua ke nrog Quest Flow + Telegram bot, thiab txuas rau Chatwoot CRM.

gemini.heading: Google Gemini API tus yuam sij
gemini.lead: Ib tus yuam sij tus kheej los ntawm AI Studio. Qhov no hloov tus yuam sij thoob ntiaj teb rau txhua qhov kev hu xov tooj Gemini ntawm koj tus account.

gemini.leadSuffix: Siv es tsis txhob siv thoob ntiaj teb rau txhua qhov kev hu xov tooj Gemini ntawm koj tus account.

telegram.heading: Telegram bot rau kev ceeb toom
telegram.lead: Tsim ib tug bot nrog @BotFather thiab ntxig nws lub token. Txhua tus neeg uas xa xov rau tus bot no nrog /start yuav tau txais cov ntawv ceeb toom: cov neeg siv khoom tshiab, cov cim npe, cov teeb meem kev sib koom ua ke. Koj tuaj yeem sau npe ntau tus neeg ua haujlwm lossis ntxiv tus bot rau hauv ib pawg lossis channel - cov ntawv ceeb toom yuav raug xa mus rau txhua tus neeg tau txais.
telegram.leadAllWhoStart: Txhua tus neeg uas sau ntawv rau tus bot no
telegram.leadAfterStart: , yuav tau txais cov ntawv ceeb toom txog cov neeg siv khoom tshiab, cov cim npe, thiab qhov yuam kev ntawm kev koom ua ke. Koj tuaj yeem sau npe ntau tus neeg ua haujlwm lossis ntxiv tus bot rau hauv ib pawg lossis channel - txhua tus neeg yuav tau txais cov ntawv ceeb toom tsis siv neeg.

imageModel.heading: Image generation model
imageModel.lead: Single model for the whole account, used ONLY for image generation/editing in Quest Flow. Translation and recognition keep their own model.
imageModel.needKey: Txuag thiab txheeb xyuas qhov API key ua ntej - kev tsim duab xav tau nws.
imageModel.hint: Nano Banana ua haujlwm tsim, kho thiab teeb tsa. Imagen tsuas yog tsim los ntawm kos.

prompt.subtitle: Kev qhia thiab kev paub txog kev sau ntawv hauv chav video xwb

prompt.errLoadSettings: Tsis tau thauj cov chaw teeb tsa
prompt.kbHeading: Lub Hauv Paus Kev Paub — TXT / Word / Excel / CSV
prompt.kbLead: Upload ib daim ntawv—catalog, FAQ, daim ntawv teev nqi, cov cai, lossis cov ntaub ntawv qhia. Cov ntsiab lus raug txheeb xyuas ntawm lub server (Word/Excel/CSV → ntawv) thiab koom ua ke los ntawm AI thaum sau cov lus hauv chav video. Txwv: 50 MB cov ntaub ntawv / 500,000 tus cim hauv lub database.

questFlow.heading: Quest Flow
questFlow.subtitle: Cov lus teb AI rau cov neeg siv khoom ntawm Telegram bots thiab Inbound API
questFlow.warning: Yog tias daim teb tsis muaj dab tsi, qhov kev ceeb toom VibeVox dav dav yuav raug siv.

questFlow.headerLead: Kev sib tham AI nrog txhua tus neeg siv khoom ib tus zuj zus los ntawm Telegram bot txuas nrog Quest Flow.
questFlow.keysHeading: Cov yuam sij API Quest Flow
questFlow.keysLead: Txhua tus yuam sij yog ib qho zais cia uas koj ntxig rau hauv Quest Flow HTTP block ntawm ib txoj saw. VibeVox siv nws los txheeb xyuas koj tus account. Koj tuaj yeem tsim ntau tus yuam sij rau ntau txoj saw sib txawv.

questFlow.promptLead1: Txheeb xyuas YUAV UA LI CAS AI sib txuas lus nrog cov neeg siv khoom los ntawm Quest Flow: lub suab, style, dab tsi yuav txheeb xyuas.

questFlow.kbHeading: Lub hauv paus kev paub Quest Flow
questFlow.kbLead1: Cov Ntaub Ntawv - phau ntawv teev cov kev pabcuam, daim ntawv teev nqi, Cov Lus Nug Feem Ntau. Upload TXT / Word / Excel / CSV.
questFlow.kbLead2: — AI yuav tsis muaj cov ntaub ntawv tseeb ntawm lub tuam txhab; nws tsuas yog yuav teb raws li kev paub dav dav. Lub hauv paus no
questFlow.kbLead3: Los ntawm ntu "Cov Lus Qhia"—rau kev sau cov yeeb yaj kiab. Kev txwv: 50 MB cov ntaub ntawv / 500,000 tus cim hauv lub ntaub ntawv.

questFlow.tagsHeading: Cov Cim Qhia Txog Kev Xav Tau
questFlow.tagsLead: Tus AI muab cov cim npe no rau cov neeg siv khoom yog tias nws pom qhov sib phim hauv kev sib tham. Cov cim npe tau tso tawm rau ntawm daim npav chav ntawm tus neeg siv khoom thiab xa mus rau CRM (Ntu 4).
questFlow.confirmDeleteBody: Tus yuam sij yuav raug rho tawm mus tas li. Quest Flow yuav tsis ua haujlwm ntxiv lawm los ntawm nws — koj yuav tsum tsim ib tus yuam sij tshiab thiab hloov nws hauv txoj saw.

chatwoot.whatSentItem2: Kev sib tham nrog ib daim ntawv ntiag tug = keeb kwm sib tham tag nrho
chatwoot.whatSentItem3Prefix: Tag nrho cov cim npe ntawm cov kev xav tau hauv
chatwoot.whatSentFooter: Xa thaum koj nias "Xa mus rau CRM" hauv chav sib tham. Xa tsis siv neeg thaum pom daim ntawv cim npe yog qhov feature tom ntej.

imagePresets.heading: Image processing blocks
imagePresets.lead: Each block is a preset: a function + prompt + (optional) reference images. The bot button in Quest Flow sends this preset's key, and VibeVox transforms the image with exactly this preset — the AI chooses nothing.
imagePresets.modelHint: change it in the Gemini API section
imagePresets.empty: No blocks yet. Add the first one.
imagePresets.confirmDeleteBody: The block will be removed after you save.
imagePresets.labelPlaceholder: Block name, e.g. “Try on our jacket”
imagePresets.presetKeyLabel: Preset key (paste into the Quest Flow button)
imagePresets.promptExtraLabel: Extra prompt (added to the function's base prompt)
imagePresets.intakeLabel: How the bot asks the client for inputs
imagePresets.intakePlaceholder: e.g. Send a full-height photo of yourself
imagePresets.replyCaptionPlaceholder: Text sent to the client together with the image
imagePresets.referenceHint: Fixed images always added to this block's generation.
imagePresets.referenceMaxHint: Up to {{max}} images for the current model.

mcp.heading: MCP — connect external AI agents / CRM
mcp.lead: Generate an individual key and connect this account to any MCP-compatible agent (Claude, ChatGPT connectors, n8n, your own agent). Two-way: read leads/dialogs and perform actions.
mcp.urlHint: Paste this URL + the key into your agent's MCP settings.
mcp.keysLead: Each key is bound to this account and carries the scopes you select. The raw key is shown once.
mcp.createdWarning: Copy the key now — it is shown only once.
mcp.noKeys: No keys yet. Create the first one.
mcp.confirmDeleteBody: Agents using this key will lose access immediately.
mcp.howToBody: In your agent/CRM add a remote MCP server: the URL above + header Authorization: Bearer <your key>. The agent sees only the tools your scopes allow.

billingPage.featureRollover: Nqa cov feeb mus rau lub hlis tom ntej
billingPage.featureCRM: Cov ntawv teev npe rau cov neeg siv khoom uas muaj kev lees paub tsis siv neeg

billingPage.featureSmartTags: Kev cim npe ntse ntawm cov kev xav tau

billingPage.whatsAppMessage: Nyob zoo! Kuv xav paub txog txoj kev npaj Enterprise VibeVox.
billingPage.searchLanguagesPlaceholder: Nrhiav koj hom lus - piv txwv li, "Portuguese", "português", ru
billingPage.faqQ1: Yuav ua li cas rau cov feeb uas tsis tau siv?
billingPage.faqA1: Cov feeb uas tsis siv yuav siv mus rau lub hlis tom ntej. Lawv tas sij hawm rau lub hlis thib peb.
billingPage.faqQ2: Kuv puas tuaj yeem rho tawm kuv daim ntawv sau npe txhua lub sijhawm?
billingPage.faqA2: Yog. Koj tuaj yeem rho tawm hauv koj tus account nrog ib qho nias xwb. Lub sijhawm uas twb tau them lawm yuav txuas ntxiv mus txog thaum kawg.
billingPage.faqA3: Tag nrho AI pawg: daim npav rau cov neeg siv khoom nrog kev lees paub tus kheej, Telegram kev tso cai, cov lus qhia tus kheej, Google Calendar, kev cim npe ntse, CRM export, kev koom ua ke nrog questflow.pro, thiab ib qho tab admin sib cais.
billingPage.faqQ4: Koj xav tau tus neeg muab kev pabcuam SIP twg?
billingPage.faqA4: Txhua yam RFC-ua raws li: Zadarma, OnlinePBX, Asterisk/FreePBX, thiab lwm yam. VibeVox tsim ib lub trunk tawm mus rau lwm qhov tsis siv neeg.
billingPage.topupDescription: €0.17 ib feeb. Txij li 60 feeb mus txog 10 teev. Tau txais nyiaj tam sim ntawd tom qab them nyiaj.
billingPage.discountWithPromo: nrog luv nqi ntawm -{{percent}}% nrog tus lej promo {{code}}
billingPage.cancelDetailActiveUntil: Qhov kev sau npe yuav tseem ua haujlwm mus txog {{date}}.
billingPage.cancelDetailMinutesAvailable: Cov feeb them nqi tseem siv tau txog hnub no; koj tuaj yeem yuav cov feeb ntxiv.
billingPage.cancelDetailAutoClose: Tom qab ntawd, qhov kev sau npe yuav kaw cia.
billingPage.autoRenewCancelledHeading: Kev txuas ntxiv tsis siv neeg raug tshem tawm · kev sau npe yuav kaw {{date}}
billingPage.autoRenewCancelledHint: Cov ntaub ntawv teev tseg ntawm koj txoj kev npaj siv tau txog hnub no; koj tuaj yeem yuav ntxiv. Nyem "Pib dua" yog tias koj hloov siab.
billingPage.yearlySavings: Txuag tau €59 ib xyoos (2 lub hlis pub dawb)
billingPage.languagesLead: Daim ntawv teev tag nrho cov lus uas txhawb nqa los ntawm kev txhais lus tib lub sijhawm. Kev nrhiav pom cov lus pib tsis siv neeg - txhua tus neeg koom nrog xaiv lawv hom lus ib txwm muaj.
billingPage.languagesNoResults: Tsis pom cov lus no nyob rau hauv daim ntawv teev cov lus txhawb nqa.
billingPage.languagesNoResultsHint: Sim sau lwm yam—piv txwv li, siv lus Askiv lossis cov tsiaj ntawv hauv zos. Yog tias hom lus ntawd ploj lawm, qhia rau peb paub, thiab peb mam li ntxiv rau.

seo.title: VibeVox — Kev txhais lus AI tiag tiag rau kev hu video thiab SIP
seo.description: VibeVox yog ib lub platform txhais lus suab uas siv AI ua ke thiab txhawb nqa ntau tshaj 100 hom lus. Muaj kev hu video, SIP telephony, sib tham nrog cov neeg siv khoom, thiab kev tshuaj xyuas kev sib tham uas siv AI ua ke.
seo.keywords: Kev txhais lus AI, kev txhais lus tib lub sijhawm, kev hu video nrog kev txhais lus, SIP xov tooj, lub tshuab txhais lus suab

pwaInstall.name: VibeVox
pwaInstall.description: VibeVox yog lub tshuab txhais lus AI tib lub sijhawm rau kev hu xov tooj thiab video hauv 108 hom lus. WebRTC thiab SIP telephony, tus pab cuam suab, thiab kev txhais lus tiag tiag ua haujlwm ntawm txhua lub cuab yeej.
pwaInstall.installCta: Ntxiv VibeVox rau koj lub vijtsam hauv tsev—hu xov tooj nrog kev txhais lus, SIP, thiab tus pabcuam AI hauv ib qho nias. Ua haujlwm zoo li ib lub app hauv zos.
pwaInstall.buttonSubtitle: Mus rau qhov screen tsev - tso tawm hauv ib qho kais
pwaInstall.buttonAria: Nruab VibeVox ua ib qho app
